title: Crispy Roasted Peruvian Chicken Stir-fry
description: This savory, crispy dish features chicken legs roasted until perfectly golden and served in a flavorful sauce with crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Jalapeno pepper, finely chopped (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a milder dish, omit or use a smaller amount

instructions: Season chicken with olive oil, salt, pepper, cumin, coriander, and garlic. Mix well.
Place seasoned chicken on a roasting rack in a shallow roasting pan or baking dish.
Roast for about 30-35 minutes until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C) and the skin is crispy.
While chicken roasts, chop jalapeno pepper finely if using, to serve as desired.
Drizzle roasted chicken with olive oil and sprinkle with salt flakes and chopped cilantro leaves before serving.
For an extra crunch, toss vegetables like bell peppers, onions, and carrots in a little bit of olive oil before adding them to the pan during the last 10 minutes of chicken roasting time.
